SOSAIOT-TC-94884.title: [base ui]: Verify that the Network -> Interface page loads

SOSAIOT-TC-94885.title: [base ui]:Title and Hierarchy: Verify the breadcrumb navigation "Network / System / Interfaces" displays correctly.

SOSAIOT-TC-94886.title: [base ui]:Tab Switching: Verify that the "Interface Settings" and "Traffic Statistics" tabs switch correctly.

SOSAIOT-TC-94887.title: [base ui]: Protocol View Switching: Verify that the IPv4 and IPv6 sub-tabs switch correctly.

SOSAIOT-TC-94891.title: [base ui]: Bottom Statistics: Verify that the total count at the bottom matches the number of visible interfaces (including sub-interfaces)

SOSAIOT-TC-94888.title: [base ui]: Default Data: Verify that default data in IPv4 is displayed correctly.

SOSAIOT-TC-94889.title: [base ui]: Default Data: Verify that default data in IPv6 is displayed correctly.

SOSAIOT-TC-94903.title: [Interface Table]: Verify table headers include: NAME, ZONE, GROUP, IP ADDRESS, SUBNET MASK, IP ASSIGNMENT, STATUS, ENABLED, and COMMENT.

SOSAIOT-TC-94898.title: [Control Usability]: Verify clicking "Virtual Interface" correctly pops up the configuration dialog.

SOSAIOT-TC-94899.title: [Control Usability]: Verify clicking "VPN Tunnel Interface" correctly redirects to or pops up the VPN configuration interface.

SOSAIOT-TC-94900.title: [Control Usability]: Verify clicking "4to6 Tunnel Interface" pops up the IPv4 to IPv6 tunnel configuration window.
